news.t: DWS Expands Xtrackers ESG Suite With Dividend, Growth and Value ETFs

holdings.infoBox: SNPG is an equity ETF with a total of 88 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 9.01%, NVIDIA at 8.08%, Microsoft at 7.23%, Eli Lilly and Company at 6.97%, and Alphabet at 4.90%.

overview.description: The Xtrackers S&P 500 Growth Scored & Screened ETF (SNPG) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 Growth ESG index. The fund tracks a principles-selected, market cap-weighted index of US large-cap securities exhibiting strong growth, and positive environmental, social, and governance characteristics. SNPG was launched on Nov 9, 2022 and is issued by Xtrackers.

data.title: DWS Expands Xtrackers ESG Suite With Dividend, Growth and Value ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--DWS, one of the world's leading asset managers, announced today the listing of three new exchange-traded funds (ETFs) that provide exposure to U.S. equity investment styles ...
